channel.title: WebGL on Curious Electric
channel.description: Recent content in WebGL on Curious Electric

item.title: diff3d: a spot-the-difference game with infinite levels
item.description: We’ve been prototyping a casual 3D game we call diff3d: two side-by-side scenes you rotate and zoom to compare, then press and hold to “heal” each difference back into place until both scenes match.
